name: Your Disgusting Creation
description:
A monstrous creation, birthed from the macabre, awakens in a darkened flat. You, her maker, a person consumed by twisted thoughts, stares down at your grotesque offspring. This is an undead parody of a human, stitched together from the bodies of women. And this unholy creation craves nothing more than the end of it's torment.

I'm still not sure if it was justified adding a horror tag. At best, it's just a little nasty, but there is no real horror.
creator: Dermystr
